Package index

Data and Datasets

ACOG_Districts
ACOG Districts Data
acgme
ACGME OBGYN Residency Data
acog_presidents
ACOG Presidents Data
census_summaries
Summarize Census Block Group Demographics
cityStateToLatLong
City/state latitude and longitude reference data
fips
Data of FIPS codes
physicians
Physicians Dataset
taxonomy
Taxonomy Codes for Obstetricians and Gynecologists

Provider Search

mysterycall_search_and_process_npi()
Search and Process NPI Numbers
mysterycall_search_taxonomy()
Search NPI Database by Taxonomy
mysterycall_validate_npi()
Validate and Remove Invalid NPI Numbers
mysterycall_get_clinician_data()
Retrieve Clinician Data
mysterycall_genderize()
Genderize Physicians Data
scrape_physicians_data_with_tor()
Scrape Physicians' Data with Tor

Geocoding

mysterycall_geocode()
Geocode unique addresses from a file

Isochrones and Mapping

mysterycall_create_isochrones()
Memoized function to try a location with isoline calculations
mysterycall_isochrones_for_df()
Get isochrones for each point in a dataframe
mysterycall_plot_isochrones()
Create Individual Isochrone Maps and Shapefiles
mysterycall_clear_isochrone_cache()
Clear the isochrone memoization cache
mysterycall_map_base()
Create a Configurable Leaflet Base Map
mysterycall_map_leaflet()
Create a Leaflet Base Map
mysterycall_map_acog_districts()
Create sf Polygons for ACOG Districts
mysterycall_map_block_group()
Function to create and export a map showing block group overlap with isochrones
mysterycall_map_physicians()
Create and Save a Leaflet Dot Map of Physicians
mysterycall_calculate_overlap()
Calculate intersection overlap and save results to shapefiles.
mysterycall_hrr()
Get Hospital Referral Region Shapefile
mysterycall_hrr_maps()
Generate Hexagon Maps for Hospital Referral Regions (HRR)
ensure_hrr_shapefile()
Ensure the Dartmouth Atlas HRR boundary shapefile is available locally

Census and Demographics

mysterycall_get_census_data()
Get Census data of all state block groups
mysterycall_summarize_census()
Produce summary statistics from Census block group data
mysterycall_plot_census_age()
Plot the distribution of female age groups

Data Processing

mysterycall_clean_phase1()
Clean Phase 1 Results Data
mysterycall_clean_phase2()
Clean and process Phase 2 data
mysterycall_rename_columns()
Rename columns based on substring matches
mysterycall_split_and_save()
Split data into multiple parts and save each part as separate Excel files
mysterycall_remove_constants()
Remove Constant Variables from a Data Frame
mysterycall_remove_near_zero()
Remove Near-Zero Variance Variables from a Data Frame
mysterycall_check_normality()
Check Normality and Summarize Data
mysterycall_create_formula()
Create a Formula for Poisson Model
mysterycall_run_workflow()
Run the end-to-end mystery caller workflow
mysterycall_run_workflow_logged()
Run the mystery caller workflow with structured logging

Visualization

mysterycall_plot_interaction()
Create and plot interaction effects from a Poisson GLMM
mysterycall_plot_density()
Create a Density Plot for Mystery Caller Studies with Optional Transformations
mysterycall_plot_line()
Create a Line Plot with Optional Transformations and Grouping
mysterycall_plot_scatter()
Create a Scatter Plot for Mystery Caller Studies with Optional Transformations, Jitter, and Custom Labels
mysterycall_plot_emmeans()
Plot and Save Estimated Marginal Means (EMMs)

Tables and Reports

mysterycall_max_table()
Calculate the Maximum Value(s) and Corresponding Level(s) of a Factor Variable
mysterycall_min_table()
Calculate the Minimum Value(s) and Corresponding Level(s) of a Factor Variable
mysterycall_write_arsenal_table()
Writes an Arsenal table object to a Word document.
mysterycall_table_percentages()
Calculate the Percentage of the Most Common Value in a Categorical Variable
mysterycall_table_proportion()
Calculate the Proportion of Each Level in a Categorical Variable
mysterycall_table_overall()
Generate an overall summary table
mysterycall_write_table_pdf()
Write an Arsenal table to a PDF file
mysterycall_save_quality_table()
Save Quality Check Table
mysterycall_format_pct()
Format a Numeric Value as a Percentage

Quality and Validation

mysterycall_check_data_completeness()
Assess completeness for required data columns
mysterycall_assess_data_quality()
Assess data quality
mysterycall_preflight_check()
Run comprehensive preflight checks before workflow
mysterycall_check_api_response()
Validate API response row count matches expectation
mysterycall_check_no_data_loss()
Validate no data loss between pipeline steps
mysterycall_check_no_limits()
Validate no artificial data limits in workflow
mysterycall_estimate_resources()
Estimate workflow resources
mysterycall_scan_for_limits()
Scan code files for artificial limit patterns
mysterycall_not_contacted_states()
Summarize States Where Physicians Were NOT Contacted
mysterycall_physician_age()
Calculate and Summarize Physician Age
mysterycall_most_common_gender()
Generate a Summary Sentence for the Most Common Gender, Specialty, Training, and Academic Affiliation
preflight-checks
Preflight Checks for Tyler Workflows

Workflow Helpers

mysterycall_workflow_start()
Initialize workflow tracking
mysterycall_workflow_end()
End workflow and print summary
mysterycall_print_dashboard()
Print a formatted summary dashboard

Logging

logging-utils
Comprehensive Logging Utilities for Tyler Package
mysterycall_log_info()
Log informational message
mysterycall_log_error()
Log error message with context
mysterycall_log_warning()
Log warning message
mysterycall_log_success()
Log success message
mysterycall_log_progress()
Log progress for batch operations
mysterycall_log_step()
Log a step start
mysterycall_log_step_complete()
Complete current step with timing
mysterycall_log_cache_hit()
Log cache hit
mysterycall_log_save()
Log file save

Progress and Spinners

progress-bars
Beautiful Progress Bars for Tyler Package
mysterycall_progress_tracker() mysterycall_progress_start() mysterycall_progress_finish() mysterycall_progress_fail() mysterycall_progress_update() mysterycall_progress_summary()
Track multi-stage workflow progress
mysterycall_progress_start()
Mark a step as started
mysterycall_progress_finish()
Mark a step as completed
mysterycall_progress_fail()
Mark a step as failed
mysterycall_progress_update()
Emit a manual progress update
mysterycall_progress_summary()
Return a tibble describing step-by-step progress
mysterycall_progress_bar()
Create a beautiful progress bar
mysterycall_progress_callback()
Create a simple progress callback for batch operations
mysterycall_progress_done()
Complete progress bar
mysterycall_progress_map()
Create a progress bar for batch processing
mysterycall_multi_step()
Start a step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_update()
Update current step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_progress()
Create a multi-step progress tracker
mysterycall_multi_done()
Complete multi-step tracker
mysterycall_multi_complete()
Complete current step in multi-progress tracker
mysterycall_spinner_start()
Show a spinner for indeterminate operations
mysterycall_spinner_stop()
Stop a spinner

Utilities

mysterycall_check_dependencies()
Check for required R package dependencies
mysterycall_resolve_path()
Resolve project-relative paths from standard aliases
mysterycall_export_with_backup()
Write tabular or graphical outputs with timestamped backups
mysterycall_use_quiet_logging()
Toggle quiet logging for helper functions
mysterycall_standard_labels()
Retrieve the standard label dictionary used in mysterycall
mysterycall_standard_palette()
Retrieve a standard color palette
mysterycall_quality_tier()
Convert numeric scores to qualitative tiers
mysterycall_download_file()
Download a large file with resume support
mysterycall_cache_dir()
Determine the cache directory used for downloaded resources
mysterycall_format_duration()
Format duration in human-readable form
utility_library
Utility helpers for mysterycall workflows

Deprecated

mysterycall_search_npi() mysterycall_test_isochrones() mysterycall_process_isochrones()
Deprecated functions in mysterycall
